## Summary
- [ ] I described what changed and why.

## Validation
- [ ] `make check` passes locally.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior changes.

## Security Review Checklist
- [ ] Read-only API guarantees are preserved (no mutating command paths introduced).
- [ ] No secrets/tokens are committed or written to generated artifacts.
- [ ] New dependencies are justified and reviewed.
- [ ] Output compatibility impact assessed (`OUTPUT_COMPATIBILITY.md`).
- [ ] Threat/risk notes added for non-trivial changes.
